description: Once the Zephyr arrives at the Lighthouse, Simmons and the team face a crisis of conscience. They realize the only remaining dose of Centipede Serum could either save Coulson or be used in a plan to stop Talbot, but not both. The agents must now choose between saving their leader or the world, leaving the episode on a powerful, unresolved note.

transcript.line: He is not going to die. Not yet, at least. But his condition is worsening and accelerating.
What about the treatment we talked about?
We have something we think will work. It will just take some time to combine it with the Centipede Serum.
What about Talbot? You find a way to stop him? He's worse, too.
Yeah, we think so. Unfortunately, it's not a cure. It's more... It's more terminal. If we can combine the odium with another dose of the Centipede Serum, it should be able to penetrate his cells.
Well, yeah, it's entirely possible. We ran a simulation...
No, it's not possible. There is no more Centipede Serum. What I brought back, that's the last of it.
